title: Lilac Time
writer: Jane Cowl, Guy Fowler, Willis Goldbeck
actors: Colleen Moore, Gary Cooper, Eugenie Besserer
plot: All of those handsome young men in their flying machines are billeted in a field next to the Widow Berthelot's farmhouse in France. Her daughter Jeannine is curious about the young men fighting for England in World War I and their...
